meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template Checklist
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap with this advanced Antigravity project template. A high-impact checklist for freelancers to ship professional SaaS apps fast.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing clients with empty hands. Deploy a high-fidelity 'Antigravity' project template to showcase your engineering rigor. By combining Antigravity's architectural scaffolding with Claude Code's autonomous execution, you can transform a complex, production-ready SaaS idea into a live, impressive portfolio piece in under two hours.
content.intro:
The cold reality of freelancing is that clients don't buy promises; they buy proof. You are stuck in the 'no portfolio' purgatory, watching high-ticket contracts slip to developers who simply look the part. The market is saturated with hobbyists, and your lack of a tangible, complex showcase is the only barrier between you and your next five-figure retainer.

It is time to defy gravity. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you move beyond basic CRUD apps and into enterprise-grade architecture. This workflow isn't just about building code; it's about building authority. We will use Claude Code to accelerate the heavy lifting, ensuring your portfolio reflects the speed and precision of a senior-level engineer.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Initialize the Antigravity template to establish a professional folder structure, CI/CD pipelines, and robust TypeScript configurations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a professional SaaS boilerplate with Next.js 15, Tailwind, and Supabase integration, focusing on modular architecture and clean code patterns.

steps.title: Data Modeling & Schema
steps.description: Define a complex database schema that proves you understand relational data, auth, and multi-tenant security.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a multi-tenant PostgreSQL schema for a project management SaaS including users, organizations, project boards, and audit logs.

steps.title: Core Feature Engineering
steps.description: Implement a high-value feature like real-time collaboration or AI-driven analytics to showcase advanced technical depth.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a real-time state synchronization service using WebSockets, ensuring conflict-free updates for multi-user project boards.

steps.title: UI/UX Polish
steps.description: Apply professional styling standards to make the project look like a premium SaaS product rather than a student exercise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply a clean, enterprise-grade dark mode theme using Shadcn/UI components, ensuring high contrast and responsive design across all viewports.

steps.title: Production Hardening
steps.description: Automate security audits and performance testing to demonstrate your commitment to professional-grade deployment standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure automated security scanning and lighthouse performance checks within the GitHub Actions workflow.

pro_tips: Always include a 'Technical Debt' document in your repo to show clients you understand the trade-offs of rapid development.
Use Claude Code to generate a comprehensive README.md that explains the 'why' behind your architectural decisions, not just the 'what'.
Deploy your portfolio projects to Vercel with preview environments enabled; showing a client a live URL is 10x more persuasive than a GitHub link.
Add a 'Decision Log' file to your repository; it proves you think like a Senior Engineer by documenting why you chose specific libraries.
Keep your commit history clean; use Claude Code to squash commits before pushing to demonstrate professional project management habits.
content.next_steps: Once your project is deployed, record a 60-second Loom video walking through the architecture. Send this video alongside your portfolio link to three high-ticket prospects this week.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for free and start building for your future. Transform your workflow, impress your clients, and dominate the freelance market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
